_comment: Sound library: Roblox asset IDs grouped by category. Claude reads from this when a game needs a sound. Each category holds several IDs so Claude can pick at random. Humans add IDs after uploading audio to Roblox (Creator Dashboard -> Audio) and pasting the resulting asset ID here. Sounds must be uploaded and moderation-approved by Roblox before they will play.
_usage: Reference as rbxassetid://<id> on a Sound instance. Do NOT use a local file path or a cloud URL - Roblox only plays uploaded, approved audio assets.

reward_big.description: Rare reward / jackpot / big celebration moment.

ambient_loop.description: Looping environmental ambience (NOT background music - SFX/ambience only).
